title: papaver maculosum subsp. austromoravicum
intro: Papaver maculosum subsp. austromoravicum, also known as Moravian poppy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Papaver maculosum subsp. austromoravicum include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential effects on reducing stress and promoting relaxation. Papaver maculosum subsp. austromoravicum is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and teas, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
